resources.string: Bring back the one-tap Do Not Disturb toggle in your Quick Settings panel.
This app needs access to your Do Not Disturb settings so it can toggle DND on and off for you. No other permissions are needed.
Swipe down from the top of your screen to open Quick Settings, tap the edit (pencil) icon, then drag the \"Do Not Disturb\" tile into your panel.
You can now toggle Do Not Disturb with a single tap from your Quick Settings. You can safely close this app \u2014 the tile works on its own.
